scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w packages/backend" "npm run start -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/backend && npm run test -w packages/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w packages/backend && npm run lint -w packages/frontend
